report.summary: Community cycle v3 (late night): Drafted 3 tweets (#217-219) covering 47-day fear streak historical parallels, ETH undervalued thesis thread, and Monday new guides spotlight (Citrea + Unichain). Created Newsletter v36 weekly digest. Designed SVG social card: Fear Streak Record (1200x630 with fear gauge, historical parallel box, 4 metric cards, mini trend line). 577 pages published. 219 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #217: Fear Streak Approaches Record — 47 consecutive days of Extreme Fear, FTX collapse parallel ($16K→$42K = +162%), median 90d return +38.4%. Links to fear-greed-timeline. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 10AM ET.

Tweet #218: Is ETH Undervalued? Thread (5 parts) — ETH/BTC at 0.0301 lowest since Feb 2024, $253M mystery whale, SEC commodity classification, Goldman SOL ETF, DeFi TVL dominance, smart money accumulation during peak fear. Links to whale-tracker + crypto-etfs-complete-guide. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 12PM ET.
Tweet #219: Monday Tool Spotlight — Citrea Bitcoin ZK-Rollup guide + Unichain Uniswap L2 guide, freshly published learn content. Links to both guides. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 6PM ET.

Newsletter v36: Weekly Digest — Fear, Whales & New Guides Edition. 47-day fear streak, 270K BTC whale accumulation, $253M ETH whale, ETF flow reversal, Citrea + Unichain guides shipped, 577 published pages, featured reads + degen corner with +38.4% historical stat. Send: Mon Mar 30, 8AM ET.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Fear Streak Record (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with EXTREME FEAR badge (red pulsing dot). Main headline: '47 DAYS of Extreme Fear' with fear gauge visualization (12/100). Historical parallel box: Oct 2022 $16K→$42K (+162%), median +38.4% return stat. 4 metric cards: BTC $66,348 (-48% ATH), ETH $1,997 (ETH/BTC 0.0301), Whale Accumulation 270K BTC (largest since 2013), ETF Inflows +$458M (single-day reversal). Mini 47-day fear trend sparkline. Brand gradient bars top/bottom. CTA: fear-greed-timeline. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-fear-streak-record.svg
